title: juncus alpinus subsp. requienii
intro: Juncus alpinus subsp. requienii, also known as Adam's needle or Juncus, is a type of succulent plant belonging to the Juncaceae family. Traditionally, Juncus alpinus subsp. requienii has been used in folk medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as soothing irritated skin, reducing swelling, and promoting wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, Juncus alpinus subsp. requienii is often used in infusions, tinctures, and creams, although proper dosages and usage should be guided by a healthcare professional.
